decision_memo.thesis: Unit margin is 21,996 HUF⊕; CAC ceiling is 8,798 HUF⊕. No channel has local data proving CAC below ceiling — benchmarks span it for search, retargeting, and Meta. Verdict: CONDITIONAL. Do not allocate media budget; complete the two zero-cost data pulls first, then unlock pilot spend.

decisions.text: Pull Google Keyword Planner data for 'GPS okósóra', 'futóóra' — resolves highest-sensitivity unknown, zero budget, 1 hour.
Request direct creator quotes from 2–3 Hungarian running/sports creators — resolves KOL fee unknown, zero budget.
If search CAC validation shows CAC < 8,800 HUF: unlock T01 + T05 pilot (80,000 HUF combined)
If retargeting validation shows incremental CVR > 0.5pp vs holdout: unlock T03 + T04 (30,000 HUF)
Meta prospecting at scale — best-case benchmark CAC exceeds ceiling at scale; undetermined only as a micro-test

overturn_conditions: Margin is actually 50%+ (not 40%): ceiling rises to 10,998 HUF; search benchmark mid-range clears it
Local search CPC is at benchmark low (120 HUF) AND CVR at 3.5%: CAC = 3,429 HUF → viable
Hungary market size is 2,000+ eligible/day (not 500): ATE experiment becomes 29 days not 114
decision_memo.weakest_point: All channel CAC estimates rest on benchmark ranges, not local measurement. The interval for search spans 3,429–23,333 HUF — a 7× range that makes viable and not-viable both plausible.

price_huf.label: Retail price (HUF)
price_huf.basis: EU market positioning for HUAWEI FIT series mid-tier; no live listing verified as of 2026-06-12

margin_rate.label: Gross margin rate
margin_rate.basis: user input; not confirmed by HUAWEI finance team

vat_rate.label: Hungary VAT rate
vat_rate.basis: Hungary standard VAT rate 27%, highest in EU — stable fact, treated as assumed without direct URL

cac_share.label: CAC share of unit margin
cac_share.basis: acquisition ≤ 40% of first-order unit margin; conservative for mid-tier consumer electronics

search_cpc_bench.label: Search CPC benchmark (HUF)
search_cpc_bench.basis: EU benchmark for consumer electronics search CPC (Google Ads, 2024-2025); Hungary is lower-cost than Western EU

search_cvr_bench.label: Search CVR benchmark
search_cvr_bench.basis: e-commerce benchmark CVR for mid-tier electronics category search

search_cac_bench.label: Search CAC benchmark (HUF)
search_cac_bench.note: Interval spans ceiling → verdict is undetermined, not a coin flip

rtg_cpc_bench.label: Retargeting CPC benchmark (HUF)
rtg_cpc_bench.basis: retargeting CPC benchmark HU, lower than prospecting due to audience quality

rtg_cvr_bench.label: Retargeting CVR benchmark
rtg_cvr_bench.basis: warm audience retargeting CVR benchmark for electronics

meta_cpm_bench.label: Meta CPM benchmark (HUF)
meta_cpm_bench.basis: Meta CPM benchmark for Hungary consumer electronics, 2024-2025

meta_ctr_bench.label: Meta CTR benchmark
meta_ctr_bench.basis: Meta CTR benchmark for carousel/single-image consumer electronics

meta_cvr_bench.label: Meta social-to-purchase CVR benchmark
meta_cvr_bench.basis: social-to-purchase CVR for mid-tier electronics; low due to low intent at impression

meta_cac_bench.label: Meta CAC benchmark (HUF)
meta_cac_bench.note: Wide interval — Meta can be viable at best case but 6× over ceiling at worst

kol_fee_range.label: KOL creator fee estimate (HUF)
kol_fee_range.basis: estimated mid-tier Hungarian tech/sports creator fee range; direct quotes pending

pilot_search_budget.label: Search pilot budget (HUF)
pilot_search_budget.basis: 3-week minimal validation spend for category search terms

garmin_fr55_price.label: Garmin Forerunner 55 HU retail price (HUF)
garmin_fr55_price.basis: Garmin Forerunner 55 typical HU retail — approximate parity with FIT 5 Pro

samsung_fit3_price.label: Samsung Galaxy Fit 3 HU retail price (HUF)
samsung_fit3_price.basis: Samsung Galaxy Fit 3 typical HU retail — below FIT 5 Pro

sensitivity.effect: If CPC = 120 HUF (benchmark low), search CAC = 3,429 HUF → viable. If CPC = 350 HUF + CVR 1.5%, CAC = 23,333 HUF → not viable. This single input overturns the verdict.
CAC ceiling rises from 8,798 to 10,998 HUF; search mid-range clears it
ATE experiment compresses from 114 to 29 days

channel_screen.reasoning: Benchmark interval 3,429–23,333 HUF spans ceiling of 8,798 HUF. Local CPC data (missing) is needed to resolve.
Shopping CPCs similar to search; conversion rate higher (intent-matched). Verdict mirrors search pending local data.
eMAG sponsored listings CPC and CVR data unavailable without eMAG account. Zero-cost request possible.
Interval 2,000–80,000 HUF — too wide to declare viable. Micro-test (5,000 HUF) only to establish local CVR.
Warm audience; benchmark interval 1,600–7,500 HUF — best case viable. Priority 2 data pull.
CPV-based; direct CAC not applicable. Role: build GPS proof content and creator review asset.
Creator fee missing (pending quotes). UTM attribution only — no incrementality without holdout design.

product_facts.label: Dual-band GPS (L1+L5)
product_facts.detail: Route accuracy claim for runners and cyclists; addresses wrist-GPS drift pain point

product_facts.label: 10-day battery life
product_facts.detail: Differentiator vs Samsung Galaxy Fit 3 (8d) and Garmin FR55 (~20d, price-matched); targets daily-charging frustration

product_facts.label: ECG + SpO2 + stress monitoring
product_facts.detail: Health tracking suite; enables D3 health-habit audience targeting

product_facts.label: Female health tracking
product_facts.detail: Cycle + pregnancy mode; D5 dimension — COMPLIANCE FLAG required before activation

product_facts.label: HUAWEI Health ecosystem
product_facts.detail: Integration with Huawei phones, band, earbuds; basis for D7 ecosystem targeting

product_facts.label: Price vs Garmin FR55 (feature-matched)
product_facts.detail: FIT 5 Pro ~54,990 HUF vs Garmin FR55 ~54,990 HUF: price parity with GPS sports watch; headline comparison claim

market_facts.fact: Hungary population ~10M; smartphone penetration ~85%; smartwatch adoption <10% and growing
Hungarian VAT 27% (highest in EU) — affects retail pricing and margin calculations
Primary e-commerce platforms: eMAG.hu (largest), Alza.hu, MediaMarkt, Extreme Digital
Primary price-comparison site: árgép.hu — critical purchase-decision touchpoint for electronics
Google Search dominant (95%+ search share); Meta/Instagram strong for 18–45 consumer electronics
Garmin and Samsung are primary smartwatch competitors; Apple Watch SE is aspirational but ~3× price

channels.name: Google Search
channels.proxy_quality: High — keyword intent is strong purchase signal
channels.note: Local CPC data required to resolve

channels.name: Google Shopping
channels.proxy_quality: High — Shopping intent is highest-intent signal
channels.note: Mirrors search verdict; Shopping CVR typically higher

channels.name: Retail Media (eMAG)
channels.task: Capture platform-native purchase intent on largest HU e-commerce site
channels.proxy_quality: Medium — eMAG-specific CVR unavailable without account
channels.note: Zero-cost data request possible to eMAG account manager

channels.name: Meta (Facebook/Instagram)
channels.proxy_quality: Low for purchase — low intent at impression stage
channels.note: Micro-test only (5,000 HUF) to establish local CVR baseline

channels.name: Retargeting (Google/Meta)
channels.task: Re-engage warm product-page visitors and competitor-page visitors
channels.proxy_quality: High — warm audience with demonstrated intent signal
channels.note: Best-case benchmark viable; priority 2 after search data pull

channels.name: YouTube
channels.task: GPS proof content and creator review asset (role-only; not direct response)
channels.proxy_quality: N/A — brand/content role, no direct purchase attribution
channels.note: CPV metric; enables T06 creator content distribution

channels.name: KOL / Creator
channels.task: Running community awareness via creator GPS demo content
channels.proxy_quality: Low for incrementality — UTM only without holdout
channels.note: Fee quotes pending; ROI is Hypothesis until holdout designed

dimensions.name: Running intent
dimensions.mechanism: Runners tracking route accuracy respond to dual-band GPS precision claim — wrist GPS drift is their stated pain in running communities
dimensions.proxy: Google search: 'futóóra GPS' 'GPS okósóra' 'útvonal pontosság óra'; Facebook running interest

dimensions.name: Long battery pain
dimensions.mechanism: Users charging smartwatch daily respond to 10-day battery claim — daily charging is a friction cost they already articulate in reviews
dimensions.proxy: Search: 'okósóra akkumulátor' 'okósóra töltés' — volume unknown (C3 challenge)

dimensions.name: Health tracking habit
dimensions.mechanism: Existing fitness app users with daily tracking habit extract immediate utility from richer sensor data; respond to health feature proof content
dimensions.proxy: Facebook: fitness/health app interest; Google: health tracking content viewers

dimensions.name: Competitor comparison
dimensions.mechanism: Active comparison shoppers at decision stage respond to direct price+feature contrast vs Garmin/Samsung — purchase intent is high but brand is undecided
dimensions.proxy: Google: competitor brand terms ('Garmin okósóra', 'Samsung Watch'); árgép.hu category visitors

dimensions.name: Female health tracking
dimensions.mechanism: Women who track reproductive health respond to dedicated cycle/pregnancy features — these are absent or inferior in Garmin FR55 and Samsung Fit 3
dimensions.proxy: Facebook: women's health content, pregnancy apps interest

dimensions.name: HUAWEI ecosystem
dimensions.mechanism: Existing Huawei phone users see immediate integration benefit with Huawei Health app — reduces switching friction
dimensions.proxy: Facebook: Huawei brand interest; Android Huawei device targeting

dimensions.name: Deal-seeker (SUPPRESSION)
dimensions.mechanism: Price-comparison-only visitors who respond to promotions have negative incremental margin after discount
dimensions.proxy: árgép.hu heavy users; coupon keyword searchers

dimensions.name: Ad fatigue (SUPPRESSION)
dimensions.mechanism: Users with 5+ ad exposures and no conversion are saturated; continued spend is waste or sleeping-dog risk

reviewer_table.challenge: Sure-thing: do existing Huawei users buy this watch regardless of ads? The ecosystem integration benefit is a purchase reason, not an ad-response mechanism.
reviewer_table.handling: Hold-out arm mandatory within Huawei device audience. Do not count organic conversions.
reviewer_table.evidence_needed: GCG holdout within Huawei phone user segment; 2-week test

reviewer_table.challenge: Correlation ≠ mechanism: does searching 'Garmin okósóra' predict response to a HUAWEI FIT 5 Pro ad, or merely high smartwatch intent (resulting in a Garmin purchase)?
reviewer_table.handling: Retain as T slot, not H. Test with direct switcher message. Monitor Garmin purchases as negative outcome.
reviewer_table.evidence_needed: A/B: HUAWEI FIT 5 Pro ad vs no-ad for competitor keyword visitors; measure incremental HUAWEI CVR

reviewer_table.challenge: Proxy reality: Hungarian keyword volume for 'okósóra akkumulátor' may be < 500 monthly — unbuyable at scale in this market.
reviewer_table.handling: Flagged as C3 open-blocking. Do not activate T02 until volume check complete.
reviewer_table.evidence_needed: Google Keyword Planner pull for HU — zero cost, 1 hour — resolve by 2026-06-19

reviewer_table.challenge: Compliance: D5 requires inferring reproductive health status from behavior signals. Under GDPR and HU advertising standards, health-adjacent targeting must be reviewed.
reviewer_table.handling: Blocked by C4. Default: exclude from plan until human compliance review complete.
reviewer_table.evidence_needed: Legal/compliance team review of targeting logic and creative claims

h_main_breakdown.hypothesis: GPS-precision search copy converts 'futóóra GPS' searchers at CAC < 8,798 HUF — 0.5pp lift over generic ads
h_main_breakdown.notes: Brand keyword holdout mandatory alongside category

h_main_breakdown.hypothesis: Switcher copy outperforms generic for competitor-brand searchers; incremental CVR > 1% for HUAWEI ad in competitor keyword context
h_main_breakdown.notes: Correlation vs mechanism challenge (C2) open — treat as T not H until holdout confirms

h_main_breakdown.hypothesis: Shopping ads for running/GPS watch category capture high-intent purchase moment; CAC within ceiling at benchmark mid-range
h_main_breakdown.notes: CAC undetermined — validate with local data before scaling

h_main_breakdown.hypothesis: Product-page visitors who viewed health features convert at CAC < 4,000 HUF with retargeting — warm audience, high intent signal
Users who viewed competitor pages respond to HUAWEI FIT 5 Pro comparison retargeting; incremental HUAWEI CVR > 0.5pp vs no-contact
h_main_breakdown.notes: Exclude Garmin+ subscribers; frequency cap at 3 exposures

h_main_breakdown.hypothesis: 2–3 running creator GPS route-accuracy demo videos drive UTM CVR > 0.8% and promo code redemptions > 50 per creator
h_main_breakdown.notes: KOL ROI is Hypothesis until holdout designed; promo code provides attribution proxy only

execution_gates.note: D2 dimension validity check — blocks T02

execution_gates.input_needed: Direct outreach to 2–3 Hungarian running/sports creators
execution_gates.note: Needed to validate KOL budget feasibility

execution_gates.input_needed: Legal/compliance sign-off on reproductive health targeting
Exposure log with assignment probability before any ML model

execution_gates.note: Verified by power_analysis.py — see callout below

actions.action: Category search ads with GPS precision copy ('futóóra GPS', 'útvonal pontosság óra')
actions.baseline: No paid search; organic product page at ~200 visits/day
actions.mechanism: Active runners frustrated by GPS drift are specifically querying precision; dual-band GPS is the direct answer
actions.guardrail: Brand keyword holdout 10% no-bid arm mandatory; if incremental CVR < 0.3pp vs holdout, pause and reassess
actions.measurement: Holdout arm (10% no-bid); measure incremental conversion rate and revenue vs organic baseline

actions.action: Competitor keyword targeting ('Garmin okósóra', 'Samsung Watch alternatíva') + switcher landing page
actions.audience: D4 — users actively searching competitor brand + model terms
actions.baseline: No competitor keyword coverage; competitor brand traffic goes to competitor pages
actions.mechanism: Near-purchase comparison shoppers are brand-undecided; FIT 5 Pro price+GPS feature contrast directly addresses their evaluation criteria
actions.guardrail: Bid conservatively; if CVR < 0.8%, competitor keyword audience may be brand-loyal (negative increment). C2 challenge open — treat as test budget only.
actions.measurement: Separate campaign; UTM tracking per keyword group; measure HUAWEI CVR vs no-ad control

actions.action: Retargeting health-feature viewers with health-tracking proof creative (ECG demo, sleep score video)
actions.audience: Product page visitors who viewed health features section; 3–14 day recency window
actions.baseline: No retargeting; warm audience exits without follow-up
actions.mechanism: Health tracking habit users have already signaled intent; proof content (ECG demo) converts consideration to purchase decision
actions.guardrail: Frequency cap: max 5 exposures per week; exclude after 14 days (diminishing returns after window)
actions.measurement: Cookie-based holdout 10% no-contact; measure incremental CVR within retargeting pool

actions.action: Retargeting competitor product-page visitors with FIT 5 Pro vs Garmin/Samsung comparison card
actions.audience: Visitors to Garmin.hu, Samsung smartwatch pages, árgép.hu smartwatch category in past 7 days
actions.baseline: No follow-up for competitor-site visitors; they proceed through competitor purchase funnel
actions.mechanism: Decision-stage comparison shoppers see direct price+feature contrast; GPS precision vs Garmin at same price point
actions.guardrail: Cap at 3 exposures; exclude strong brand-loyalty signals (Garmin premium service subscribers); C2 open — monitor carefully
actions.measurement: UTM + retargeting holdout; compare incremental HUAWEI conversions vs no-contact

actions.action: Shopping campaign targeting running/GPS watch category with FIT 5 Pro featured offer
actions.audience: D1 — category-intent (smartwatch, GPS watch, sports watch) Google Shopping intent
actions.baseline: No Shopping presence; category traffic flows to Garmin, Samsung, Apple listings
actions.mechanism: Shopping format serves high-intent purchase moment; FIT 5 Pro price parity with Garmin FR55 is headline claim in product listing
actions.guardrail: Monitor ROAS vs incremental margin; exclude Apple-ecosystem-heavy audiences where switching probability is low
actions.measurement: Google Ads experiment (treatment vs control audience); measure incremental revenue above Shopping organic baseline

actions.action: 2–3 Hungarian running/sports creator partnerships: GPS route-accuracy demo video content
actions.audience: D1 — running community via creator audience; estimated 50k–150k per creator
actions.baseline: No creator presence; running community awareness driven by organic Huawei Health content only
actions.mechanism: Running community trusts creator-led gear review over brand ads; GPS route demo with real wrist-vs-phone drift comparison directly addresses the D1 pain point
actions.guardrail: Creator fee is Assumption — pending quote. UTM + unique promo code per creator for attribution proxy. ROI is Hypothesis until holdout designed. Kill line: <50 promo redemptions per creator over 4 weeks.
actions.measurement: UTM traffic CVR vs site average; promo code redemption count; holdout design to be added in creator contract

actions.action: Female health feature campaign targeting women's health content audience
actions.audience: D5 — women's health content viewers, lifestyle + health interest
actions.mechanism: FIT 5 Pro cycle tracking + pregnancy mode addresses gaps in Garmin FR55 and Samsung Fit 3 for this segment
actions.guardrail: Requires compliance review — BLOCKED until C4 resolved
actions.measurement: Split test with/without female health copy; measure incremental CVR in target segment

challenges.question: Are existing Huawei phone users going to buy this watch regardless of ads? The ecosystem claim is a purchase reason, not an ad-response mechanism. Holdout within ecosystem audience may show zero incremental lift.
challenges.evidence_needed: GCG holdout within Huawei phone user segment; 2-week test; treat as 'data acquisition' in pilot budget

challenges.question: Does searching 'Garmin okósóra' predict response to a HUAWEI ad, or merely high smartwatch purchase intent that results in a Garmin purchase? If so, we are paying to advertise to Garmin buyers.
challenges.evidence_needed: A/B split: HUAWEI FIT 5 Pro ad vs no-ad for competitor keyword visitors; measure incremental HUAWEI (not total smartwatch) conversion rate

challenges.question: Hungarian keyword volume for 'okósóra akkumulátor' and related battery-pain searches may be < 500 monthly — below the audience size threshold for targeted bidding. This dimension may be unbuyable in this market at scale.
challenges.resolution: Pull Google Keyword Planner data by 2026-06-19 (zero cost, 1 hour) — if volume < 500 monthly, D2 is removed from the plan

challenges.question: Targeting based on inferred reproductive health status requires GDPR compliance and human review under Hungarian advertising standards. Health-adjacent copy ('cycle tracking', 'pregnancy mode') has compliance risk in HU. Default: exclude until reviewed.
challenges.evidence_needed: Legal/compliance team sign-off on targeting logic and creative before activation

challenges.question: Creator ROAS claimed by agencies conflates organic interest with ad-driven increment. Without a holdout arm in the creator contract, T06 ROI is a hypothesis, not evidence. Additionally: how many smartwatch-inclined Hungarians who aren't already following tech creators remain reachable?
challenges.evidence_needed: Creator holdout design (10% no-code arm); UTM CVR baseline vs site average to bound the increment

test_plan.name: Search CAC validation
test_plan.prediction: Category search CAC for 'GPS okósóra' will land between 3,400–23,000 HUF (benchmark interval)
test_plan.test: 3-week pilot: 50,000 HUF exact-match category terms; measure attributed + holdout-adjusted conversions
test_plan.kill_line: If CAC > 17,600 HUF (2× ceiling) after 3 weeks with ≥ 30 conversions observed → pause search and reassess margin assumptions

test_plan.name: Retargeting CVR check
test_plan.prediction: Retargeting incremental CVR (vs holdout) will exceed 0.5pp for the warm product-page visitor pool
test_plan.test: 2-week retargeting campaign (30,000 HUF) with 10% no-contact holdout arm; measure incremental CVR
test_plan.kill_line: If incremental CVR < 0.3pp (holdout - treatment < 0.3pp) after 2 weeks → retargeting pool lacks urgency; reduce frequency, extend window

test_plan.name: Creator pilot
test_plan.prediction: Running creator UTM traffic converts at > 0.8% AND promo code redemptions > 50 per creator over 4 weeks
test_plan.test: 1 creator pilot deal (direct quote required); 4-week content window with UTM + unique promo code
test_plan.kill_line: < 50 promo redemptions OR UTM CVR < 0.3% after 4 weeks → do not expand creator program

test_plan.name: Battery pain proxy reality check
test_plan.prediction: Hungarian search volume for battery-pain keywords is < 500 monthly — D2 dimension is not viable in this market
test_plan.test: Google Keyword Planner pull for 'okósóra akkumulátor', 'okósóra töltés', 'okósóra akkumulátor tartam' (zero cost, 1 hour)
test_plan.kill_line: Volume < 500/month → D2 removed from plan. Volume ≥ 2,000/month → D2 elevated to T slot.

budget_rows.item: Google Keyword Planner CPC + volume pull
Search category pilot (T01 + T02 + T05) — 3 weeks
budget_rows.condition: Unlock when: search CPC data shows projected CAC < 8,800 HUF
Unlock when: retargeting pool ≥ 500 visitors/week confirmed
Unlock when: direct creator quote received AND budget approved

budget_rows.item: Scale surviving channels to full pilot budget
budget_rows.condition: Unlock only when ≥ 1 channel confirms CAC < ceiling with holdout-validated data

budget_note: No media budget is committed at this stage. Pilot spend unlocks only when the preceding data acquisition confirms at least one channel is within the CAC ceiling. The budget table is a conditional roadmap, not a commitment.

priority_plays.why_now: Running intent has the clearest mechanism and proxy; search data pull (Day 1) will determine feasibility within a week
priority_plays.expected_cac: 3,400–23,300 HUF (benchmark interval — undetermined until local data)

priority_plays.why_now: Cheapest valid test: retargeting pool is already building from organic traffic; holdout costs are near-zero to set up
priority_plays.kill_line: Incremental CVR < 0.3pp vs holdout → retargeting pool lacks urgency

priority_plays.why_now: Creator content has the highest mechanism clarity for D1 and builds a proof asset usable in other channels (YouTube role-only section)
priority_plays.expected_cac: Undetermined — depends on fee quote and holdout CVR
priority_plays.kill_line: < 50 promo redemptions per creator over 4 weeks → do not expand

auuc_note: No uplift model scores available yet (pre-experiment). AUUC gate (qini_auuc.py) applies after pilot data collection. Prerequisite: propensity log P(t|x) must be set up before any scaled deployment.

kol.roi_rule: KOL ROI is never Evidence without a holdout or credible identification strategy. All creator attribution below is tagged Hypothesis or Needs test. UTM + promo codes are attribution proxies, not incrementality estimates.

creators.format: GPS route-accuracy demo video: wrist GPS vs phone comparison on a real Budapest route
creators.attribution: UTM link + unique promo code per creator for attribution proxy
creators.incrementality_note: Hypothesis until holdout arm designed into creator contract. Kill line: < 50 promo redemptions over 4 weeks.

creators.format: Battery life test video: 10-day tracking across multiple hikes with comparison to previous device
creators.incrementality_note: Needs test — D2 proxy validity check (C3) must pass before activating this creator type.

measurement_plan.primary_metric: Incremental conversions (holdout-validated) — channels that cannot be holdout-tested contribute Hypothesis-tagged metrics only
secondary_metrics: Creator UTM CVR (proxy only, not causal)
measurement_plan.scale_up_rule: Scale budget for a channel only when: (1) holdout-validated incremental CVR > 0.5pp AND (2) holdout-validated incremental CAC < 8,800 HUF AND (3) ≥ 100 incremental conversions observed
measurement_plan.pause_rule: Pause any channel immediately when: holdout-validated incremental CAC > 17,600 HUF (2× ceiling) for 7 consecutive days OR frequency > 8 exposures with < 0.2pp CVR
measurement_plan.gcg_design: Global Control Group: 5% of eligible audience excluded from all paid touch throughout the pilot. Enables post-hoc ATE estimation. Group assignment by user ID hash — stable across channels.
measurement_plan.hte_note: Hungary alone cannot power HTE experiments (473 days at 500 eligible/day). HTE requires pooling across CEE markets (Hungary + Romania + Czech Republic + Slovakia: estimated 5,000 eligible/day combined → 48 days for HTE). This is a planning input, not a current deliverable — HTE activation is L2+ after ATE is validated.

suppression_rules.rule: Exclude D8 deal-seekers after first discount-only purchase
suppression_rules.reason: Discount-only buyers have negative incremental margin on repeat; exclusion protects contribution margin on cohort

suppression_rules.rule: Exclude users with ≥5 ad exposures and zero engagement (0 clicks, 0 video views)
suppression_rules.reason: Saturated audience; continued spend is waste or sleeping-dog harm to brand sentiment

suppression_rules.rule: Frequency cap: max 5 impressions per user per week across all channels combined
suppression_rules.reason: Prevents fatigue across channel combinations; especially critical for retargeting + search combined exposure

suppression_rules.rule: Exclude D5 female health targeting until C4 (compliance review) is resolved
suppression_rules.reason: GDPR and HU advertising standards — default exclude for health-adjacent targeting without legal sign-off

suppression_rules.rule: Suppress global control group (5% of eligible) from all paid touch throughout pilot
suppression_rules.reason: Preserves ATE estimation capability; GCG is a non-negotiable prerequisite for any causal claim

ope_note: OPE support check (ope_estimators.py) will run once propensity log P(t|x) is collected from the pilot. Gate: support check must pass before any policy optimization or scaled deployment beyond the pilot.

checklist.item: Propensity log P(t|x) designed into experiment before launch
Global Control Group (5% no-touch) set up and stable through pilot
Holdout arms confirmed for all pilot campaigns (T01, T03, T04, T05)
Keyword Planner CPC + volume pull for 'GPS okósóra' and D2 battery-pain terms completed
Creator fee quotes received from ≥ 2 Hungarian running/sports creators
D5 female health: compliance review completed and signed off
D2 battery pain: proxy volume > 500/month confirmed OR dimension removed from plan
C4 (compliance) challenge resolved before T07 activation
All monetary figures carry claim tags (Evidence / Assumption / Hypothesis / Needs test)
No KOL/creator fee tagged as Evidence without direct quote
Benchmark CAC ranges labeled Assumption; no benchmark treated as local evidence
HTE experiment scope documented as requiring CEE market pooling (not Hungary alone)
power_analysis.py: ATE 28,304/arm, HTE 59,116/cell, 114-day ATE at 500 eligible/day confirmed

facts.fact: eMAG is Hungary's largest e-commerce platform by GMV

rejected_options.reason: Best-case benchmark CAC interval spans ceiling; scale spend would require local CVR data first. Not rejected for micro-test (5,000 HUF).

rejected_options.option: Full HTE experiment in Hungary only
rejected_options.reason: power_analysis.py: 473 days at 500 eligible/day. HTE requires CEE market pooling (48 days at 5,000/day combined). Hungary-only HTE is not operationally feasible.
C4 challenge is open-blocking. Default: exclude health-adjacent targeting without legal sign-off.
